reviews.review_description: My Samsung Galaxy S7 and gear vr cannot run this game

developer_response.body: We are Support Gear Vr S7 edge and Over ONLY With Snapdragon Chipset The phone must have been purchased USA or CHINA to have Snapdragon!

reviews.review_title: A must buy game for Go.
reviews.review_description:
I was surprised how good this game is. 
It has a good diversity of weapons and monsters. Reminds me of doom. 
The scale looks incredible with monsters towering above you. Good control with a great feel. A surprising wave game that's lots of fun. A must buy if you own Go. A great pick up and play game. You should add to your wishlist. 😊
Reviewed by Arnookie VR

developer_response.body: Hi Arnookie , We're very glad that you liked the game.

reviews.review_description:
Good locomotion control. Good weapon selection. Smooth framerate. Good sound. Creative and diverse enemy models. Appreciate how they change in scale (nothing like blasting away at a towering giant).

Generally don't find wave shooters engrossing, but this game had enough variation and polish to keep it interesting.

Worth the few bucks you'll pay for it.

developer_response.body: Hi thatactionjackson, Thank you for your review with 5* rating. We're very glad that you liked the game.

reviews.review_description: I gave it 4 stars for the wonky controls, but other than that great game! Worth the money!

developer_response.body: Hey AlleyKatGurl, We're very glad that you liked the game. ;)

reviews.review_description: This game could be really good if is wasn't for the awkward control. I wanted to like this game a lot more than what I do. Overall, for the price it's not that bad if you can get past the control scheme. Has many different enemies and basically a first person shooter.

reviews.review_title: Definitely add to your game library!!
reviews.review_description: It's an open world wave shooter that has freakishly amazing monsters. Truly  immersive game play that never gets boring. Just get it & you'll agree.

developer_response.body: Hey 1NF1N1T1 .Thank you for your comment, It’s very nice to know that you liked the game.

reviews.review_description: Solid wave shooter with excellent locomotion and shooting mechanics, it even has scoreboards to compete with other players! Reminds of quake style games, with very good detailed graphics. Recommended!

Movement is a little sticky sometimes in that you can get stuck on the environment but the gameplay is pretty solid feels a lot better than most gear vr games it looks good and plays good.

To the dev: sometimes it feels like bullets are too weak maybe this could be fixed by slowing the rush animations after the monster gets shot. A lot of the time where I took damage or died was because I was stuck on a rock or wall and the gun didnt kill things fast enough so they boxed me in to where I couldn't move anymore.

developer_response.body: You Should try using more power weapons and always aim for the head. On the next update balance changes will be made.Thank you for commenting!if you want to make suggestions please email at : anomosstudios@gmail.com Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Good wave shooter. Also, style/feeling reminds me alot on Onslaught from the Wii, liked it alot.

developer_response.body: Hey JMDF , We're very glad that you liked the game

reviews.review_description: Game is good but it could have unlimited shots

reviews.review_description: ..game! Simple shooting but lots of fun. Very nice graphics and exiting mood. Got to give 4 stars. Nice price too. Buy it!

developer_response.body: Hey Basse2017 .Thank you for your comment, It’s very nice to know that you liked the game.   ;)

reviews.review_description: Technically good, but the limitations of the vr controller make it frustrating at times. The environments could do with being a little more interesting as they're pretty featureless. If you like action shooters and competing for the scoreboard it has some replay value.

developer_response.body: Hey WeAreTheSwine, We're very glad that you liked the game.
